base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of clouds_bg_underwater_variant — a background_layer (parallax_single) from 1985 super mario bros. Cloud background, underwater palette — clouds take subtle purple tint. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cloud background, underwater palette — clouds take subtle purple tint; rarely used (underwater typically has no sky clouds visible)
